## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. Navigate to `...`
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or logs.

## Environment

- **Go version:** (e.g., 1.26)

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or log output here.
